summary: Fixed deal_sync_external.py syntax error (orphan code after main()) and data field mapping issues (title case vs lowercase, missing field mappings). Ran full sync successfully: 24 Zo partnerships updated, 51 acquirers updated, 21 leadership inserted.
learnings: Cache data uses inconsistent field casing - Zo partnerships use title case (Company, Founder, Warmth) while Careerspan sources use lowercase
Leadership records have company_relation as Notion page IDs, not company names - requires Notion API to resolve
Orphan code blocks (function bodies pasted outside functions) cause syntax errors that pass py_compile but fail at runtime
notes_for_orchestrator: Leadership records use placeholder company names '[Leadership: PersonName]' since company_relation IDs cannot be resolved without Notion API integration. This may need follow-up work if actual company names are needed.
fixes_applied: Deleted orphan code blocks after line 435 (lines 437-555 were function bodies outside any function)
Fixed sync_zo_partnerships to use title case field names (Company, Founder, Warmth, etc.) matching actual cache data
Fixed sync_careerspan_leadership to properly map person/notion_id fields and generate valid deal IDs
